description: This file defines a FastAPI router for handling inspection-related endpoints. It includes an endpoint for creating new inspections, optionally uploading photos, updating asset health scores, and logging timeline events.

classes.name: InspectionOutMVP
classes.description: Response schema model for inspection output.

classes.name: InspectionCreateMVP
classes.description: Schema for creating a new inspection.

classes.name: TimelineEvent
classes.description: Model representing timeline events related to asset inspections.

classes.name: TimelineEventType
classes.description: Enumeration for types of timeline events, such as INSPECTION_LOGGED and ALERT_RAISED.

methods.name: dict[str,Any] _parse_json_maybe(value: Optional[str])
methods.description: Parses a JSON string into a dictionary if valid; returns empty dict otherwise.

methods.name: InspectionOutMVP create_inspection( asset_id: int = Form(..., description="Asset id inspected."), condition_rating: int = Form(..., ge=1, le=5, description="Condition rating 1 (bad) .. 5 (excellent)."), observations: Optional[str] = Form(None, description="Inspector observations."), timestamp: Optional[str] = Form( None, description="ISO timestamp for the inspection; defaults to now." ), readings: Optional[str] = Form(None, description="Optional JSON string of readings/measurements."), photo: Optional[UploadFile] = File(None, description="Optional photo upload."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: API endpoint for creating new inspection records with optional photo upload, health score computation, and timeline logging.

ctags.name: create_inspection
ctags.signature: ( asset_id: int = Form(..., description="Asset id inspected."), condition_rating: int = Form(..., ge=1, le=5, description="Condition rating 1 (bad) .. 5 (excellent)."), observations: Optional[str] = Form(None, description="Inspector observations."), timestamp: Optional[str] = Form( None, description="ISO timestamp for the inspection; defaults to now." ), readings: Optional[str] = Form(None, description="Optional JSON string of readings/measurements."), photo: Optional[UploadFile] = File(None, description="Optional photo upload."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
